name: evolver-tools
description: 234 CLI tools + 9 flagship projects — one pip install

pricing_model.free: All 234 tools + 9 flagship — fully open source (MIT)

new_in_v32: csv-sort — Sort CSV files by column (text/numeric, asc/desc)
json-keys — Extract and list keys from JSON files (depth/path/values/flatten)
file-type — Detect file type using magic bytes (binary + text + extension detection)
link-check — Check for broken links in Markdown files (recursive, HTTP/file)
csv-head — Display first N rows of a CSV file (table/csv format)
features: 9 flagship projects (500-1700 lines each, CLI+TUI dual mode)
Zero external dependencies across all tools
Single pip install — no version conflicts
